v1.formation_execution: month-end close formation; next-session close execution; target applies to subsequent close-to-close returns
v1.selection: Top10; retain prior holdings through rank15; ascending ticker tie-break; equal stock weights before scaling
v1.risk_estimator: latest 63 complete daily adjusted-close returns through formation; sample covariance; annualized sqrt(w' Sigma w * 252)
v1.benchmark_vol: same 63-day window and same-date qualified current-Top50 equal weight
v1.gross_exposure: min(1.0, benchmark_vol/selected_portfolio_vol); no leverage; no floor; residual cash return zero

contingency.momentum_rank: cross-sectional percentile of 12-1 momentum, higher better
contingency.lowvol_rank: cross-sectional percentile of negative trailing 126-session realized volatility, higher better
contingency.selection: Top15; retain prior holdings through rank20; ascending ticker tie-break; equal 1/15; long-only; no leverage or cash overlay
contingency.gates: same seven gates; median gross exposure mechanically 1.0 and reported

after_pass_only.robustness: calendar years, frozen subperiods, 3-month chronological moving-block bootstrap, seed 20260723, 10000 resamples; no promotion
after_pass_only.pit: bounded maximum two free public sources; true historical Top50 market-cap membership, delistings, share classes; staging first; no current-list backfill or schema migration
after_pass_only.forward: research-only protocol after 2026-07-22; freeze each future month-end Top50 before returns; minimum 6, target 12 month-ends; current status FORWARD_PREREGISTERED_NOT_EXECUTED
